title: Fog Settings
description:
The fog settings definition containing description, distance, and volumetric properties.

Properties:
• description ({ identifier })
• distance ({ air, water, lava, ... })
• volumetric (object)

description.title: Description
description.description:
Contains the fog settings identifier.

Properties:
• identifier (boolean)

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: The unique identifier for this fog setting, e.g., 'custom:my_fog'.

distance.title: Distance
distance.description:
Distance-based fog settings for air, water, lava, and weather conditions.

Properties:
• air (object)
• water (object)
• lava (object)
• lava_resistance (object)
• weather (object)
• powder_snow (object)

volumetric.title: Volumetric
volumetric.description: Volumetric fog settings including density and media coefficients.

defaultSnippets.label: Fog Settings Definition
defaultSnippets.description: The fog settings definition containing description, distance, and volumetric properties.
